category_sources: source_facts.description says developer-focused CLI for Kubernetes and OpenShift; official odo docs describe odo as a CLI for building and deploying applications on Kubernetes.
display_name_sources: Official site and docs use the product name odo; source_facts.executables lists odo.
docs_sources: Official odo.dev documentation includes introduction, installation, and command reference pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/redhat-developer/odo, so repo enrichment is intentionally not repeated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Kubernetes and OpenShift; official odo introduction and homepage describe container-based application development.
